rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings and assignments.
Insert AGREE contracts in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and scope rules during AGREE annex insertion.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE contracts.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed in scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings should appear after subcomponents and connections in the implementation scope.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL property names directly as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
